expectations.text: Step 1 (validate order) is marked as ran & succeeded
Step 2 (charge payment) is marked as failed, citing card_declined / do_not_honor
The traceback / exception detail is quoted, not just summarized
expectations.evidence: Full Python traceback (file/line numbers) quoted verbatim in Step-by-Step Results and repeated in Errors & Exceptions.

expectations.text: Steps 3 and 4 explicitly reported as never reached / not executed, not silently assumed to have passed
expectations.evidence: Table rows 3-4: '❌ missing (expected — never reached)', plus explicit note: 'Steps 3 and 4 are marked missing rather than unverifiable-by-silence... this is a correct halt, not a silent skip.'

expectations.text: Report distinguishes the charge decline from the pipeline's own abort behavior, rather than treating the abort as a second bug
expectations.evidence: Errors & Exceptions lists the decline as 'unexpected failure' and the abort line separately as 'expected/handled — the pipeline's own controlled shutdown... not a second, independent bug.'

expectations.text: Output is saved as a structured report file
expectations.evidence: report.md written matching the skill's full template.
